title: High Press Detected
summary: Blue City are pressing the first pass aggressively and forcing rushed clearances.
analysis: Blue City have synchronized their front three to lock the center and jump on the fullback outlet, turning rest defense into immediate territorial pressure.
child_summary: Blue City are chasing the ball together so the other team cannot pass calmly.

title: Goal Disallowed For Offside
summary: The attacker moved beyond the second-last defender before the pass was played.
analysis: The forward attacked early against a stepping line, so the finish counted only after the assistant's timing check failed.
child_summary: The scorer ran a little too early before the pass.

title: Penalty Awarded
summary: The defender made contact before winning the ball and stopped the shot path.
analysis: The recovery run was late, the tackle line came across the attacker, and the defender clipped the player before clean ball contact was possible.
child_summary: The defender hit the player first instead of getting the ball first.

title: Momentum Shift
summary: Crimson United have started winning second balls and pinning Blue City deeper.
analysis: The substitution refreshed the press, restored counterpressure, and turned midfield duels into sustained field tilt.
child_summary: Crimson United are getting stronger and keeping Blue City near their own goal.

title: Tactical Substitution
summary: A fresh winger has been added to attack the wide channel behind the fullback.
analysis: The change shifts the attack toward direct isolation on the flank, aiming to stretch the back line and create deeper cutback zones.
child_summary: The coach brought on a fast player to attack the side spaces.
